headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Arista Networks (ANET) After Its 120% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Arista Networks at around US$172.47 is still reasonably priced after a strong run, the next sections will walk through what the current market level might imply about its value. The stock has returned 3.4% over the last 7 days, 42.8% over the last 30 days, 29.1% year to date and 120.2% over the past year, with a 3 year return of 330.7% and a 5 year return that is very large at close to 8x.
